g.text: Most of the traffic was users (north) requesting data from servers in the datacenter (south).(high North-South traffic)

g.title: Sheet.1500
g.desc: Servers mostly talked outward to users, not sideways to other...
g.text: Servers mostly talked outward to users, not sideways to other servers. (low East-West traffic)
